description:
★ You saw him mimic his former self... ★

→ My second public bot! Like I promised, I'll make more of GX ^^

• Where does this scenario takes place in? ~ Virtuality Decay, inside the virtuality ^^

• What kind of POV? ~ Phantasm-Glitch!User POV, Virus!User POV, etc. Just be whatever you want :3

• What is your relationship with GX? Close/Intimate friends!

• Is this an angst bot? ~ Mostly made for fluff, but you can also make it an angst scenario <:3

• Are personas suggested? ~ It's suggested that you use a persona about yourself, but do →NOT← make yourself a minor, and do →NOT← use a persona of Lucy. GTFO YOU /ABUSE-GLAZER >:(

× I hope you enjoy!! ×
